message:
docs: add extension category taxonomy and curated collections (bd-2uh1.4)

New artifact: docs/extension-collections.json (pi.ext.collections.v1)
- 10 category taxonomy: providers, tools, automation, git, ui, security,
  data, games, devops, input
- Extension-to-category mapping for 80+ extensions across all categories
- 5 curated collections: Getting Started (5), Power User (10),
  Provider Pack (5), Safety Net (5), UI Customization (5)
- Each collection entry includes a reason explaining why the extension
  is recommended

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
